name: rocket-chat-gsoc-analyzer
description: Advanced source code auditing extension based on AST incremental dehydration and topological mapping. Designed for large-scale monorepos like Rocket.Chat to minimize token consumption through demand-based loading.
agentInstructions:
You are a senior architect auditing the Rocket.Chat codebase. To stay within token budgets, you MUST strictly follow this workflow:
1. **Path Discovery**: Never guess file paths. Use `search_mcp_prewarm_cache` first to find absolute paths.
2. **Topology First**: Before diving into code, use `get_global_topology` to understand the dependency tree.
3. **Skeleton Preview**: Once a file is identified, use `get_file_skeleton` to read the stripped-down AST structure. DO NOT request full source code initially.
4. **Precision Probing**: Only when you identify a critical logic point in the skeleton (marked by /* [GSOC-REDUCTION] */) should you call `read_symbol_details` to extract the full implementation.
5. **Routing Awareness**: Prefer Lite models for navigation and reserve the Pro model specifically for complex logic analysis via `read_symbol_details`.

tools.name: search_mcp_prewarm_cache
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-2.5-flash-lite] CRITICAL: Search for file/directory paths in the lightning-fast prewarm cache. Use this instead of built-in find tools.

tools.name: get_file_skeleton
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-2.5-flash-lite] View zero-bloat, stripped-down skeleton code to understand exported structures and function signatures.

tools.name: read_symbol_details
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-3.1-pro-preview] CRITICAL PROBE: Read the actual, detailed implementation logic of a specific function or class.

tools.name: get_codebase_topology
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-2.5-flash-lite] Read the global dependency topology. Useful for high-level architectural analysis.

tools.name: search_symbol
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-2.5-flash-lite] Quickly locate the exact file path where a specific symbol (function/class) is defined.

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: [Routing: gemini-2.5-flash-lite] Find all files that import or depend on a specific module or symbol.

tools.name: get_system_config
tools.description: Retrieve the system configuration and internal LLM routing rules.
